title: Marketing Technologist, Data Enablement
skills: Play a key role in configuration, integration and operations of marketing systems including Marketing Analytics Platform to help with automating data ingestion pipelines, building taxonomy tools, datasets for end to end Marketing Campaign performance and reporting.

This role is a combination of hands-on-keyboards(Manage marketing systems integrations, data ingestion, and built ETLs to prepare analytics datasets) AND program management (work with various teams to align on roadmaps for collecting, testing and preparing both third party and own data).

Integral team member driving the marketing technology roadmap by participating in onboarding of new platforms from implementation, integration, execution, data and security compliance review and training user teams.
Drive the shift to an AI-native operating model by applying systems thinking to fundamentally change workflows, leveraging AI as a 'creator' and 'true coworker'.

Lead the investigation and implementation of AI-driven tooling and integrations (e.g., Meta Ads AI Connectors, LLM-powered agents, Databricks embedded prompts) to automate campaign setup, content generation, and operational execution for marketing initiatives.
Enable self-service data and conversational analytics by deploying AI/LLM agents to allow non-technical teams to query diverse data sources and surface campaign performance insights.
Build dashboards/reports needed by marketing teams using AI and Genie spaces.
Coordinating with other dev dependencies to align cross-tech team sprint schedules & release plans.
Documents and maintains standard/efficient processes, automating as much as possible.
Enable cross-team testing scenarios.
You have 3+ years of experience in Engineering, Analytics, Tech. Operations, Marketing Technologist role, shipping scalable platforms and services in marketing-related domains
You are experienced in SQL, Python (or other programming languages), Databricks/Tableau Dashboards and familiar with ETL tools and integration with Marketing systems.
You have hands-on experience in using AWS services like S3, Lambda, etc.
You have experience applying systems thinking to drive the shift to an AI-native operating model and fundamentally change workflows.
You are skilled in implementing AI-driven tooling and integrations.
You have experience enabling self-service and conversational analytics by deploying AI/LLM agents.
You champion fast experimentation cycles with AI capabilities to validate and translate new technical direction.
You gravitate toward the detail but can keep the big picture in focus.
You love data and all that it can power.
You take a highly analytical approach, using data to drive step-change results.
You have experience in a TPM tool like Wrike or JIRA.
You exhibit a collaborative working style with a solid focus on execution
You have the modesty to question assumptions, seek broad input, and validate iteratively.
You have operational excellence, clear communication and take ownership of your work.
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Operations Management, or similar field preferred or equivalent experience
description:
About the job

About The Team

We are looking for an experienced Marketing Technologist or Marketing TPM in the Marketing Operations space to help build highly coordinated and efficient infrastructure that enables Zillow's marketing organization. As part of this role, you will integrate with and operate on various marketing systems and will be a key point person for data, infrastructure, activation and analytics for marketing initiatives and campaigns.

About The Role

This role will serve as a technical liaison between marketing, analytics, engineering and marketing vendor teams to bring all partners together toward a common goal. The ideal candidate shines in a fast-paced and ambiguous environment, and has a balance of program management and hands on technical skills. If you like solving complex problems and are passionate about enabling marketing teams and delivering the vision of Zillow 2.0, we want to hear from you!


Play a key role in configuration, integration and operations of marketing systems including Marketing Analytics Platform to help with automating data ingestion pipelines, building taxonomy tools, datasets for end to end Marketing Campaign performance and reporting. 
This role is a combination of hands-on-keyboards(Manage marketing systems integrations, data ingestion, and built ETLs to prepare analytics datasets) AND program management (work with various teams to align on roadmaps for collecting, testing and preparing both third party and own data). 
Integral team member driving the marketing technology roadmap by participating in onboarding of new platforms from implementation, integration, execution, data and security compliance review and training user teams. 
Drive the shift to an AI-native operating model by applying systems thinking to fundamentally change workflows, leveraging AI as a 'creator' and 'true coworker'. 
Lead the investigation and implementation of AI-driven tooling and integrations (e.g., Meta Ads AI Connectors, LLM-powered agents, Databricks embedded prompts) to automate campaign setup, content generation, and operational execution for marketing initiatives. 
Enable self-service data and conversational analytics by deploying AI/LLM agents to allow non-technical teams to query diverse data sources and surface campaign performance insights. 
Build dashboards/reports needed by marketing teams using AI and Genie spaces. 
Coordinating with other dev dependencies to align cross-tech team sprint schedules & release plans. 
Documents and maintains standard/efficient processes, automating as much as possible. 
Enable cross-team testing scenarios. 


This role has been categorized as a teleworker position. Teleworkers do not have a permanent corporate office workplace and instead work from a physical location of their choice, which must be identified to the Company. Employees may live anywhere in Mexico, with availability to travel to Mexico City, as we recommend attendance at occasional office events.

In addition to a competitive base salary and benefits, this position is also eligible for equity awards based on factors such as experience, performance and location.

Who you are


You have 3+ years of experience in Engineering, Analytics, Tech. Operations, Marketing Technologist role, shipping scalable platforms and services in marketing-related domains
You are experienced in SQL, Python (or other programming languages), Databricks/Tableau Dashboards and familiar with ETL tools and integration with Marketing systems. 
You have hands-on experience in using AWS services like S3, Lambda, etc. 
You have experience applying systems thinking to drive the shift to an AI-native operating model and fundamentally change workflows. 
You are skilled in implementing AI-driven tooling and integrations. 
You have experience enabling self-service and conversational analytics by deploying AI/LLM agents. 
You champion fast experimentation cycles with AI capabilities to validate and translate new technical direction. 
You gravitate toward the detail but can keep the big picture in focus. 
You love data and all that it can power. 
You take a highly analytical approach, using data to drive step-change results. 
You have experience in a TPM tool like Wrike or JIRA. 
You exhibit a collaborative working style with a solid focus on execution
You have the modesty to question assumptions, seek broad input, and validate iteratively. 
You have operational excellence, clear communication and take ownership of your work. 
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Operations Management, or similar field preferred or equivalent experience


Get to know us

At Zillow, we’re reimagining how people move—through the real estate market and through their careers. As the most-visited real estate platform in the U.S., we help customers navigate buying, selling, financing and renting with greater ease and confidence. Whether you're working in tech, sales, operations, or design, you’ll be part of a company that's reshaping an industry and helping more people make home a reality.

Zillow is honored to be recognized among the best workplaces in the country. Zillow was named one of FORTUNE 100 Best Companies to Work For® in 2025, and included on the PEOPLE Companies That Care® 2025 list, reflecting our commitment to creating an innovative, inclusive, and engaging culture where employees are empowered to grow.

No matter where you sit in the organization, your work will help drive innovation, support our customers, and move the industry—and your career—forward, together.

Zillow Group is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive, innovative environment with the best employees. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please contact your recruiter directly.

Qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with applicable state and local law.

Los Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.

title: Amazon Advertising Specialist
skills: Through the use of company and department practices and procedures, manages Amazon search campaigns across clients of various business types, sizes, and industries, including daily optimizations and high-level strategy changes.
Acts as a SME or Trainual content owner for one department-specific functions, develops reports, and provides guidance to peers

Provides insightful analysis, interpretation, and actionable plans based on campaign performance data from Amazon Ad Console and other retail media platforms. Aligns strategies with overall retail business performance
Engages in weekly department scrums and training sessions to deepen knowledge within the channel
Develop new department training materials
Actively seeks opportunities to enhance campaign performance and business impact, aligning strategies with client goals
Conducts in-depth market research and competitor analysis to inform campaign strategies
Maintains frequent and excellent communication both on internal agency teams and externally with assigned clients
Efficiently leverages available AI tools and delegation resources to enhance workflow effectiveness and campaign outcomes
Discusses anomalies, possible causes, and provides solutions to the manager to ensure alignment with client and company requirements
Establishes and maintains a collaborative relationships with internal teams and clients
Maintains or exceeds department-established performance standards
Other duties as assigned
Bachelor’s degree in marketing, business, or a related field or equivalent work experience
2+ years of experience in digital marketing with agency experience or related roles

Demonstrates a strong understanding of department practices, procedures, and specialized functions. Applies good judgment in selecting methods and techniques for obtaining solutions to assigned clients and projects
Proficiency in Google/Microsoft Office Suite(s) with effective navigation and utilization skills in Excel/Google Sheets for data analysis and reporting
Ability to manage higher-risk decisions involving significant capital
Experience with Amazon retail search advertising, Google paid search advertising, or similar platforms is highly valued
2+ years of significant experience managing campaigns in various platforms, including Amazon Ad Console, Amazon 3rd Party Advertising Platforms, Walmart Connect
Strong communication skills, strong English proficiency.
Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively
Remote Work: Work from anywhere—our team is global, and we value work-life balance.
Growth Opportunities: As a key player i you’ll have the chance to shape your role and grow with us.
Innovative Culture: Join a team that is passionate about leveraging data to solve challenges and drive success in a rapidly evolving market.
description:
About the job

Amazon Advertising Specialist

Location: Remote LATAM

Schedule: 9AM - 5PM PST (Pacific Standard Time)

Salary: USD- Monthly pay based on expertise.




The Advertising Strategist works under general supervision and follows company and department policies and procedures to oversee advertising strategies for clients. Responsibilities include analysis, interpretations, and strategies for advertising campaigns. Enhances digital strategy to maximize ROI, optimizes performance, and stays ahead of industry trends. Acts as a subject matter expert (SME) or Trainual content owner for one specialized department function.




Key Responsibilities

Through the use of company and department practices and procedures, manages Amazon search campaigns across clients of various business types, sizes, and industries, including daily optimizations and high-level strategy changes.
Acts as a SME or Trainual content owner for one department-specific functions, develops reports, and provides guidance to peers
Provides insightful analysis, interpretation, and actionable plans based on campaign performance data from Amazon Ad Console and other retail media platforms. Aligns strategies with overall retail business performance
Engages in weekly department scrums and training sessions to deepen knowledge within the channel
Develop new department training materials
Actively seeks opportunities to enhance campaign performance and business impact, aligning strategies with client goals
Conducts in-depth market research and competitor analysis to inform campaign strategies
Maintains frequent and excellent communication both on internal agency teams and externally with assigned clients
Efficiently leverages available AI tools and delegation resources to enhance workflow effectiveness and campaign outcomes
Discusses anomalies, possible causes, and provides solutions to the manager to ensure alignment with client and company requirements
Establishes and maintains a collaborative relationships with internal teams and clients
Maintains or exceeds department-established performance standards
Other duties as assigned




Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in marketing, business, or a related field or equivalent work experience
2+ years of experience in digital marketing with agency experience or related roles
Demonstrates a strong understanding of department practices, procedures, and specialized functions. Applies good judgment in selecting methods and techniques for obtaining solutions to assigned clients and projects
Proficiency in Google/Microsoft Office Suite(s) with effective navigation and utilization skills in Excel/Google Sheets for data analysis and reporting
Ability to manage higher-risk decisions involving significant capital
Experience with Amazon retail search advertising, Google paid search advertising, or similar platforms is highly valued
2+ years of significant experience managing campaigns in various platforms, including Amazon Ad Console, Amazon 3rd Party Advertising Platforms, Walmart Connect
Strong communication skills, strong English proficiency.
Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively




Benefits

Remote Work: Work from anywhere—our team is global, and we value work-life balance.
Growth Opportunities: As a key player i you’ll have the chance to shape your role and grow with us.
Innovative Culture: Join a team that is passionate about leveraging data to solve challenges and drive success in a rapidly evolving market.

title: Especialista en marketing digital
skills: Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.
description:
About the job

Te frustra cuando una campaña se lanza y nadie sabe realmente si funcionó? 




A nosotros también.

Por eso estamos buscando un(a) Especialista en Marketing que vea más allá de los clics y las impresiones.

Alguien que entienda que detrás de cada campaña existe un negocio, un objetivo y una oportunidad de crecimiento.




Probablemente conectes con esta vacante si alguna vez has pensado:

💭 "¿Por qué estamos haciendo esto si nadie analizó los resultados anteriores?"

💭 "Hay mejores maneras de comunicar este mensaje."

💭 "Las métricas deberían servir para tomar decisiones, no para llenar reportes."

💭 "Me gustaría participar más en la estrategia y menos en la ejecución mecánica.




Lo que harás

Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.




Lo que valoramos

Más que años de experiencia, buscamos criterio.

Queremos personas que sepan hacer preguntas inteligentes, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones respaldadas por datos.

Porque para nosotros el marketing no se trata de lanzar anuncios.

Se trata de generar resultados.




📩 Si disfrutas combinar comunicación, estrategia y análisis, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

description:
About the job

Introduction

Position: AI-Powered Lead Generation Specialist
Schedule: Part-Time, 20+ hours per week, with potential to grow into a full-time role
Location: Remote
Preferred Region: Latin America




Overview

If you're passionate about sales, automation, AI, and building meaningful connections, this is an opportunity to combine all four in a fast-growing environment.

Our client is a leadership, mental performance, and athlete development business dedicated to helping young athletes improve their confidence, mindset, leadership, and overall performance. Through a combination of coaching, mentorship, and proven systems, the organization empowers athletes to unlock their full potential both in sports and in life.

They are seeking a tech-savvy and results-driven AI-Powered Lead Generation Specialist to help build and manage their Instagram lead generation system. This role combines appointment setting, lead nurturing, CRM management, and AI automation. You'll play a key role in optimizing conversations, qualifying prospects, and helping drive business growth through scalable systems and meaningful engagement.




Key Responsibilities

Set up, manage, and optimize ManyChat automation workflows for Instagram lead generation
Integrate Claude AI with ManyChat to create personalized and scalable DM conversations
Monitor and manage AI-driven conversations to ensure prospects receive accurate and timely responses
Qualify incoming leads and determine fit based on company criteria
Conduct introductory qualification calls with athletes and parents when necessary
Book qualified appointments and strategy calls for the founder
Follow up with prospects through Instagram DMs and additional communication channels
Maintain accurate prospect records, notes, and follow-up activities within company systems
Track lead generation and appointment-setting performance metrics
Identify opportunities to improve automation workflows, response rates, and conversion rates
Collaborate directly with leadership to refine messaging, objection handling, and lead qualification processes
Test and optimize AI prompts, automation sequences, and conversation flows
Assist with future lead generation initiatives across additional channels as the company grows




Must-Have Requirements

3+ years of experience in appointment setting, lead generation, sales development, or outbound prospecting
Experience working with Instagram outreach and direct message conversations
Experience using CRM systems and lead tracking tools
Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal
Experience qualifying leads and booking appointments
Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through
Comfortable learning and implementing AI tools and automation platforms
Self-motivated and capable of working independently in a remote environment
Strong problem-solving abilities and technical aptitude
Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup




Nice-to-Have Requirements

Experience with ManyChat automation
Experience integrating Claude AI, ChatGPT, or other AI platforms into business workflows
Background in sales automation, chatbot management, or conversational marketing
Experience with HubSpot, GoHighLevel, or similar CRM platforms
Understanding of social media marketing and audience engagement strategies
Experience supporting high-ticket coaching, consulting, or service-based businesses
Athletic background or previous experience participating in competitive sports, with the ability to relate to and effectively communicate with athletes




Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to join a growing coaching business that is making a meaningful impact on young athletes both on and off the field. You'll work directly with leadership, contribute to the development of scalable lead generation systems, and have the chance to blend sales, relationship-building, AI, and automation into one dynamic role.

If you enjoy taking ownership, improving processes, experimenting with new technology, and helping drive growth through meaningful conversations, you'll have the opportunity to make a real impact while growing alongside the business. As the company continues to expand, so will the opportunities to take on greater responsibility and advance your career.

title: Especialista en diseño de productos y servicios
skills: Arquitectura de Nuevos Servicios (El Puente): Diseñarás el esqueleto operativo de nuevos productos, mapeando el Service Blueprint, la propuesta de valor y los flujos para que el SQUAD de desarrollo los haga realidad.
Prototipado Proactivo (Mentalidad Maker): Crearás aplicaciones ágiles, bots o automatizaciones en tiempo récord para validar ideas directamente en el mundo real sin depender de programación pesada.

Laboratorio de IA (El Explorador): Investigarás y dominarás activamente plataformas como Gemini, Claude y AppSheet para estructurar escenarios de negocio simulados y generar "cerebros digitales" que centralicen insights estratégicos.

Sinergia y Co-creación: Actuarás como el "Ingeniero de MVPs" apoyando al equipo de Experimentación a materializar sus pruebas científicas, y como el "Arquitecto de Inteligencia" automatizando la captura de datos para Innovación.
Pensamiento Estructural y Sistémico: Capacidad para descomponer un concepto complejo en sus piezas fundamentales (usuarios, datos, flujos de valor y tecnología).
Traductor de Negocio a Tecnología: Habilidad para escuchar una necesidad estratégica de la Gerencia y "traducirla" mentalmente en un conjunto de herramientas digitales.
Inclinación Natural al No-Code e IA: Alguien que use herramientas como AppSheet, Claude o Gemini en su día a día para resolver problemas y optimizar procesos de forma autónoma.
Resiliencia en la Experimentación: Que entienda que en el diseño de nuevos productos el fracaso es un dato valioso para iterar rápido y barato hacia el Product-Market Fit.
Por la funcionalidad e impacto real de los artefactos y prototipos creados.
Por la velocidad para transformar una idea abstracta en un MVP funcional.
Por el impacto final en la experiencia del cliente (NSS), participación de mercado y ventas de las soluciones que ayudes a diseñar.
description:
About the job

Especialista en Diseño de Nuevos Productos y Servicios 




La Misión de tu Rol: El Puente y Explorador Tecnológico

Tu misión será convertirte en el nexo vital de la innovación. Serás el Puente que conecta las ideas conceptuales con la realidad operativa, y nuestro Explorador Tecnológico, encargado de dominar herramientas No-Code y de IA Generativa para crear los artefactos y servicios del futuro.




¿Cuáles serán tus grandes retos y responsabilidades?




Arquitectura de Nuevos Servicios (El Puente): Diseñarás el esqueleto operativo de nuevos productos, mapeando el Service Blueprint, la propuesta de valor y los flujos para que el SQUAD de desarrollo los haga realidad.
Prototipado Proactivo (Mentalidad Maker): Crearás aplicaciones ágiles, bots o automatizaciones en tiempo récord para validar ideas directamente en el mundo real sin depender de programación pesada.
Laboratorio de IA (El Explorador): Investigarás y dominarás activamente plataformas como Gemini, Claude y AppSheet para estructurar escenarios de negocio simulados y generar "cerebros digitales" que centralicen insights estratégicos.
Sinergia y Co-creación: Actuarás como el "Ingeniero de MVPs" apoyando al equipo de Experimentación a materializar sus pruebas científicas, y como el "Arquitecto de Inteligencia" automatizando la captura de datos para Innovación.




¿Qué perfil y mentalidad buscamos?




Pensamiento Estructural y Sistémico: Capacidad para descomponer un concepto complejo en sus piezas fundamentales (usuarios, datos, flujos de valor y tecnología).
Traductor de Negocio a Tecnología: Habilidad para escuchar una necesidad estratégica de la Gerencia y "traducirla" mentalmente en un conjunto de herramientas digitales.
Inclinación Natural al No-Code e IA: Alguien que use herramientas como AppSheet, Claude o Gemini en su día a día para resolver problemas y optimizar procesos de forma autónoma.
Resiliencia en la Experimentación: Que entienda que en el diseño de nuevos productos el fracaso es un dato valioso para iterar rápido y barato hacia el Product-Market Fit.




¿Cómo mediremos tu éxito?




Por la funcionalidad e impacto real de los artefactos y prototipos creados.
Por la velocidad para transformar una idea abstracta en un MVP funcional.
Por el impacto final en la experiencia del cliente (NSS), participación de mercado y ventas de las soluciones que ayudes a diseñar.




¿Listo(a) para el reto?




Si tienes la mentalidad ágil que se requiere para crear el futuro de los servicios digitales y físicos, ¡queremos conocerte!

skills: Strategic Growth & Omni-Channel Execution: Align and implement omni-channel marketing, communication, and media strategies across traditional and digital platforms, using insights and analytics to capture key growth opportunities.
Go-To-Market & Innovation Leadership: Lead the strategic planning, market alignment, and launch execution for new products, re-launches, and quarterly tentpole marketing activations.
Strategic 6P Planning & Metrics: Develop and align measurable 6P marketing plans, identifying key performance indicators (KPIs) to track campaign effectiveness and business health.
Portfolio & Revenue Management: Drive product portfolio management and identify revenue growth management and simplification opportunities across therapeutic nutrition categories.
Financial & Budget Accountability: Manage the allocated A&P budget and support overall P&L management to maximize return on marketing investments.

Commercial & Field Enablement: Design, produce, and hand over high-impact promotional materials to Sales Operations, ensuring field teams and veterinary conference strategies are fully equipped to win in the retail clinic environment.
Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration or a related field
3+ years of experience in brand marketing, retail marketing, trade marketing or related fields
Proven experience executing digital and eCommerce marketing campaigns (including paid search, digital display, and social media)
Advanced English level

description:
About the job

No Relocation Assistance Offered

Job Number #174335 - Del.Miguel Hidalgo, Mexico City, Mexico

Who We Are

Colgate-Palmolive Company is a global consumer products company operating in over 200 countries specialising in Oral Care, Personal Care, Home Care, Skin Care, and Pet Nutrition. Our products are trusted in more households than any other brand in the world, making us a household name!

Join Colgate-Palmolive, a caring, innovative growth company reimagining a healthier future for people, their pets, and our planet. Guided by our core values—Caring, Inclusive, and Courageous—we foster a culture that inspires our people to achieve common goals. Together, let's build a brighter, healthier future for all.

Role Summary: 

The Science Diet Brand Manager is responsible for the development and execution of marketing strategies across commercial operations to achieve the financial and market share objectives. They lead the go-to-market planning behind innovation launches, promotional activations, traditional and digital media and 6P strategies for omni-channel customers. They ensure consistent and effective brand messaging to the veterinary profession/ consumer, and consistent consideration of retail environment specific needs/tactics. They are critical in creating and driving the execution of revenue growth management and simplification opportunities for the brand.

Responsibilities:


Strategic Growth & Omni-Channel Execution: Align and implement omni-channel marketing, communication, and media strategies across traditional and digital platforms, using insights and analytics to capture key growth opportunities. 
Go-To-Market & Innovation Leadership: Lead the strategic planning, market alignment, and launch execution for new products, re-launches, and quarterly tentpole marketing activations. 
Strategic 6P Planning & Metrics: Develop and align measurable 6P marketing plans, identifying key performance indicators (KPIs) to track campaign effectiveness and business health. 
Portfolio & Revenue Management: Drive product portfolio management and identify revenue growth management and simplification opportunities across therapeutic nutrition categories. 
Financial & Budget Accountability: Manage the allocated A&P budget and support overall P&L management to maximize return on marketing investments. 
Commercial & Field Enablement: Design, produce, and hand over high-impact promotional materials to Sales Operations, ensuring field teams and veterinary conference strategies are fully equipped to win in the retail clinic environment. 


Required Qualifications:


Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration or a related field 
3+ years of experience in brand marketing, retail marketing, trade marketing or related fields
Proven experience executing digital and eCommerce marketing campaigns (including paid search, digital display, and social media)
Advanced English level


Preferred Qualifications:


Strong analytical skills and capability to uncover measurable insights in large datasets 
Excellent project management skills, with the ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment
Critical thinking and problem solving


Our Commitment to Inclusion

Our journey begins with our people—developing strong talent with diverse backgrounds and perspectives to best serve our consumers around the world and fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels a true sense of belonging. We are dedicated to ensuring that each individual can be their authentic self, is treated with respect, and is empowered by leadership to contribute meaningfully to our business.

Equal Opportunity Employer

Colgate is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, ethnicity, age, disability, marital status, veteran status (United States positions), or any other characteristic protected by law.

Reasonable accommodation during the application process is available for persons with disabilities. Please complete this request form should you require accommodation.

title: Practicante de Marketing
description:
About the job

Oportunidad de Prácticas Profesionales | Marketing




Se busca estudiante universitario(a) para integrarse como Practicante de Marketing y brindar apoyo al área en actividades operativas, analíticas y de seguimiento dentro de la industria farmacéutica.




Objetivo del puesto

Brindar soporte operativo, analítico y creativo al equipo de Marketing, colaborando en la implementación de estrategias de comunicación, promoción y posicionamiento de productos.




Responsabilidades

• Apoyar en la ejecución de campañas promocionales y actividades de marketing.

• Recopilar y analizar información de mercado, tendencias y competencia.

• Dar soporte en la organización y logística de eventos, lanzamientos y capacitaciones.

• Elaborar reportes y presentaciones para el área.

• Dar seguimiento a proyectos y estrategias de marketing.

• Apoyar en el control y seguimiento de presupuestos y órdenes de compra.

• Coordinar actividades con proveedores externos.




Requisitos

• Estudiante activo(a) de Mercadotecnia, Administración o carrera afín.

• Contar con 1.5 a 2 años para concluir la licenciatura.

• Manejo de Excel intermedio (indispensable).

• Inglés intermedio.

• Conocimiento de herramientas de análisis de datos (deseable).

• Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.

• Proactividad, actitud de servicio y sentido de urgencia.




Condiciones

• Duración inicial de 6 meses, con posibilidad de renovación.

• Esquema híbrido.

• Horario: Lunes a viernes de 8:00 a 14:00 hrs.

• Ubicación: Polanco, Ciudad de México.

title: Paid Media Specialist (Meta + Google)
skills: Client ad accounts are actively managed, optimized, and improved on a consistent basis
Campaigns are structured clearly and aligned with client goals, budgets, and growth strategy
Meta Ads and Google Ads performance is monitored closely, with proactive adjustments made as needed

Performance insights are clearly communicated to Growth Strategists and clients
Budgets are managed responsibly with attention to pacing, efficiency, and scale
Opportunities, risks, and issues are identified early and communicated clearly
Paid media performance contributes to profitable revenue growth across client accounts

Manage campaign structures, budgets, bidding strategies, audiences, creative testing, and optimization priorities
Monitor daily and weekly performance across key paid media metrics including spend, revenue, ROAS, MER, CAC, CTR, CPC, CPM, CPA, CVR, and AOV

Work with Growth Strategists to align paid media execution with each client’s broader growth strategy
Work with creative team members to identify winning ads, creative fatigue, new testing needs, hooks, angles, and messaging opportunities

Support Google Ads execution across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, YouTube, and remarketing where applicable
Support Meta Ads execution across prospecting, retargeting, Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns, creative testing, and audience testing
Review product feeds, tracking, attribution, conversion data, and account setup to identify issues or improvement opportunities
Prepare performance updates, reporting notes, and insights for weekly client calls and internal reviews
Stay current on platform changes, best practices, and new opportunities across Meta Ads and Google Ads
Maintain strong organization across multiple client accounts, priorities, tests, and deadlines
3+ years of hands-on paid media experience managing Meta Ads and Google Ads
Strong experience working with Shopify-based eCommerce brands
Strong understanding of DTC customer acquisition and performance marketing
Experience managing paid media campaigns across Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads
Experience with Google Search, Shopping, Performance Max, remarketing, and campaign optimization
Experience with Meta campaign structure, creative testing, audience testing, retargeting, and Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns
Ability to analyze performance data and turn it into clear optimization decisions

Experience managing paid media budgets across multiple client accounts
Strong attention to detail and ability to work inside ad accounts daily
Excellent written communication skills
Highly organized and able to manage multiple accounts, tests, priorities, and deadlines
Proactive, accountable, and comfortable taking ownership of performance
Comfortable working remotely with a distributed team
Previous agency experience managing multiple eCommerce client accounts
Experience managing $100,000+ per month in paid media spend across Meta and Google
Experience with TikTok Ads, Pinterest Ads, YouTube Ads, or other paid media channels
Experience with Triple Whale, Northbeam, GA4, Looker Studio, Shopify Analytics, Klaviyo, ClickUp, or similar tools
Experience auditing ad accounts and identifying structural, tracking, creative, or scaling opportunities
Experience with creative strategy, UGC testing, landing page testing, and offer testing
Experience working with supplement, apparel, beauty, food/beverage, health, lifestyle, or other DTC eCommerce brands
Understanding of contribution margin, profitability, blended CAC, and full-funnel performance
You are analytical, proactive, and detail-oriented.
You enjoy working inside ad accounts, reviewing performance, identifying opportunities, and making clear decisions based on data.
You understand that strong paid media performance is not just about platform settings. It also depends on creative, offer, landing page, product, pricing, conversion rate, AOV, and retention.
You are comfortable managing multiple accounts and can stay organized without needing constant oversight.
You communicate clearly, take ownership, and care about helping clients grow profitably.
You are always looking for ways to improve performance, simplify account structure, test better creative, and make smarter budget decisions.
description:
About the job

About 1 At Bat Media




1 At Bat Media is a full-service eCommerce growth agency based in Toronto, helping ambitious DTC brands across Canada and the United States acquire more customers, improve retention, and scale profitably.




We specialize in performance marketing across the full customer journey, including paid media, email/SMS marketing, creative strategy, search marketing, influencer marketing, and conversion-focused eCommerce growth.




Our team works with Shopify-based eCommerce brands that are serious about growth and want a strategic partner who can help them improve performance across acquisition, retention, creative, and overall revenue strategy.




We are a lean, experienced, and performance-driven agency with a strong focus on communication, strategy, accountability, and measurable growth.




The Role




We are looking for an experienced Paid Media Specialist to manage and optimize Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns for eCommerce clients.




In this role, you will be responsible for campaign execution, optimization, testing, reporting, and performance improvement across a portfolio of DTC eCommerce brands. You will work closely with our Growth Strategists, creative team, and retention team to help clients acquire customers profitably and scale revenue.




This role is ideal for someone who is highly analytical, detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working inside ad accounts every day. You should understand how paid media fits into the broader eCommerce growth picture, including creative testing, offer strategy, landing pages, AOV, conversion rate, MER, ROAS, CAC, and retention.




The ideal candidate has strong hands-on experience with both Meta Ads and Google Ads, especially for Shopify-based eCommerce brands.




This is a remote contractor role.




What Success Looks Like




Client ad accounts are actively managed, optimized, and improved on a consistent basis
Campaigns are structured clearly and aligned with client goals, budgets, and growth strategy
Meta Ads and Google Ads performance is monitored closely, with proactive adjustments made as needed
Creative testing, audience testing, offer testing, and campaign testing are executed consistently
Performance insights are clearly communicated to Growth Strategists and clients
Budgets are managed responsibly with attention to pacing, efficiency, and scale
Opportunities, risks, and issues are identified early and communicated clearly
Paid media performance contributes to profitable revenue growth across client accounts




Responsibilities




Manage Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns for assigned eCommerce clients
Build, launch, monitor, and optimize paid media campaigns across Meta and Google
Manage campaign structures, budgets, bidding strategies, audiences, creative testing, and optimization priorities
Monitor daily and weekly performance across key paid media metrics including spend, revenue, ROAS, MER, CAC, CTR, CPC, CPM, CPA, CVR, and AOV
Analyze performance data to identify trends, issues, opportunities, and next steps
Work with Growth Strategists to align paid media execution with each client’s broader growth strategy
Work with creative team members to identify winning ads, creative fatigue, new testing needs, hooks, angles, and messaging opportunities
Provide clear recommendations for budget allocation, scaling, testing, and optimization
Support Google Ads execution across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, YouTube, and remarketing where applicable
Support Meta Ads execution across prospecting, retargeting, Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns, creative testing, and audience testing
Review product feeds, tracking, attribution, conversion data, and account setup to identify issues or improvement opportunities
Prepare performance updates, reporting notes, and insights for weekly client calls and internal reviews
Stay current on platform changes, best practices, and new opportunities across Meta Ads and Google Ads
Maintain strong organization across multiple client accounts, priorities, tests, and deadlines




Qualifications




3+ years of hands-on paid media experience managing Meta Ads and Google Ads
Strong experience working with Shopify-based eCommerce brands
Strong understanding of DTC customer acquisition and performance marketing
Experience managing paid media campaigns across Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads
Experience with Google Search, Shopping, Performance Max, remarketing, and campaign optimization
Experience with Meta campaign structure, creative testing, audience testing, retargeting, and Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns
Ability to analyze performance data and turn it into clear optimization decisions
Strong understanding of eCommerce metrics including revenue, ROAS, MER, CAC, AOV, LTV, CTR, CPC, CPM, CPA, CVR, and conversion rate
Experience managing paid media budgets across multiple client accounts
Strong attention to detail and ability to work inside ad accounts daily
Excellent written communication skills
Highly organized and able to manage multiple accounts, tests, priorities, and deadlines
Proactive, accountable, and comfortable taking ownership of performance
Comfortable working remotely with a distributed team




Nice to Have




Previous agency experience managing multiple eCommerce client accounts
Experience managing $100,000+ per month in paid media spend across Meta and Google
Experience with TikTok Ads, Pinterest Ads, YouTube Ads, or other paid media channels
Experience with Triple Whale, Northbeam, GA4, Looker Studio, Shopify Analytics, Klaviyo, ClickUp, or similar tools
Experience auditing ad accounts and identifying structural, tracking, creative, or scaling opportunities
Experience with creative strategy, UGC testing, landing page testing, and offer testing
Experience working with supplement, apparel, beauty, food/beverage, health, lifestyle, or other DTC eCommerce brands
Understanding of contribution margin, profitability, blended CAC, and full-funnel performance




Who You Are




You are analytical, proactive, and detail-oriented.
You enjoy working inside ad accounts, reviewing performance, identifying opportunities, and making clear decisions based on data.
You understand that strong paid media performance is not just about platform settings. It also depends on creative, offer, landing page, product, pricing, conversion rate, AOV, and retention.
You are comfortable managing multiple accounts and can stay organized without needing constant oversight.
You communicate clearly, take ownership, and care about helping clients grow profitably.
You are always looking for ways to improve performance, simplify account structure, test better creative, and make smarter budget decisions.

title: ELECTRIFICATION Sales Support Specialist - Customer Support
skills: Ensuring the resolution of customer issues by coordinating with Sales, Operations, Supply Chain Management, and other internal and/or external teams.

Recommending appropriate solution for customer requests and coordinating with the related teams to ensure end-to-end handling of the request (e.g., production capability and scheduling, resourcing, quotes, price lists, invoice, etc.) is in place.
Keeping the customers proactively informed on the issue status based on the inputs received and clarifying their doubts.

Preparing and analyzing regular statistics (e.g., forecast) using available tools and collecting additional relevant information and tracking regular sales performance against the target and sharing insights with the management.
You are highly skilled in quotation management, customer service, sales support, and post-sales operations within the electrical equipment and industrial solutions market.
You have 3+ years of experience in customer support, quotations, sales operations, or post-sales service.
Experience working with Medium Voltage (MV) and Low Voltage (LV) products and quotations is required.
Highly adept in SAP, Salesforce (or similar CRM platforms), and Microsoft Excel.
You are passionate about customer satisfaction, proactive communication, organization, collaboration, and problem-solving.
Degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Electromechanical Engineering, or Industrial Engineering.
You are at ease communicating in English and Spanish, with advanced English proficiency.
You must be legally authorized to work in Mexico and be based in Mexico City (CDMX). No relocation support is available for this position.
description:
About the job

En ABB, ayudamos a las industrias a funcionar de forma más eficiente y limpia, y cada una de las personas que trabajan aquí lo hace posible. Estarás capacitado para liderar, apoyado para crecer y orgulloso del impacto que creamos juntos. Únete a nosotros y ayuda a que funcione lo que hace funcionar el mundo.

Este Puesto Reporta a

Service Sales Support Manager

__

Your Role And Responsibilities

In this role, you will have the opportunity to provide technical, order, and payment-related assistance/support to the internal and external customers. Each day, you will coordinate with relevant stakeholders to obtain complete case ownership. You will also showcase your expertise by improving customer satisfaction.

The work model for the role is: #L-hybrid  (3 days in office) – Mexico City, Mexico.

This role is contributing to the Electrification Business in Mexico. Main stakeholders are Sales, Operations, Supply Chain Management, Credit & Collections, After-Sales Service, Spare Parts teams, and customers.

You Will Be Mainly Accountable For


Ensuring the resolution of customer issues by coordinating with Sales, Operations, Supply Chain Management, and other internal and/or external teams.
Recommending appropriate solution for customer requests and coordinating with the related teams to ensure end-to-end handling of the request (e.g., production capability and scheduling, resourcing, quotes, price lists, invoice, etc.) is in place.
Keeping the customers proactively informed on the issue status based on the inputs received and clarifying their doubts.
Preparing and analyzing regular statistics (e.g., forecast) using available tools and collecting additional relevant information and tracking regular sales performance against the target and sharing insights with the management.


Our team dynamics

You will join a dynamic, collaborative, and customer-focused team, where you will have the opportunity to work cross-functionally, build strong stakeholder relationships, and contribute to business growth while delivering an exceptional customer experience.

Qualifications For The Role


You are highly skilled in quotation management, customer service, sales support, and post-sales operations within the electrical equipment and industrial solutions market.
You have 3+ years of experience in customer support, quotations, sales operations, or post-sales service.
Experience working with Medium Voltage (MV) and Low Voltage (LV) products and quotations is required.
Highly adept in SAP, Salesforce (or similar CRM platforms), and Microsoft Excel.
You are passionate about customer satisfaction, proactive communication, organization, collaboration, and problem-solving.
Degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Electromechanical Engineering, or Industrial Engineering.
You are at ease communicating in English and Spanish, with advanced English proficiency.
You must be legally authorized to work in Mexico and be based in Mexico City (CDMX). No relocation support is available for this position.


Construir un futuro más limpio e inteligente requiere todo tipo de mentes: las curiosas, las valientes y las creativas. Por eso acogemos a personas de todos los orígenes y experiencias.

¿Listo para causar impacto?

Presenta tu candidatura hoy mismo o visita https://www.abb.com para saber más sobre el impacto de nuestras soluciones en todo el mundo.

title: Freelance Technical Consultant
skills: Act as the primary technical point of contact for customers across technical and executive stakeholders.
Lead discovery conversations to deeply understand client goals, problems and quality criteria.
Translate client needs into clear, actionable solution designs and delivery plans.
Advise customers on best practices in data collection, data quality, evaluation, and model training workflows.
Set expectations proactively, communicate progress regularly, and manage risks and trade-offs transparently.
Identify expansion opportunities and additional ways Toloka can create value through data and AI solutions.
Design end-to-end data solutions using Toloka’s platform, selecting appropriate components, workflows, and quality controls.

Configure data labeling components and quality controls, develop user interfaces and AI-driven tooling (e.g. agentic systems, RAGs, synthetic data generation), and integrate them into end-to-end automated pipelines for AI training and evaluation.
Run experiments and pilots to validate quality, throughput, and cost assumptions.
Lead technical execution during delivery, coordinating internal teams and external stakeholders as needed.
Ensure solutions meet agreed quality, performance, and scalability requirements.
Own delivery outcomes holistically - including technical performance, quality, timelines, and financial efficiency.
Monitor key KPIs (e.g. throughput, quality metrics, Gross Margin, Contribution Margin) and act on deviations.
Prioritize work based on customer impact and business value.
Analyze data to identify failure modes, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.
Continuously optimize solutions through iteration, automation, and adoption of new technologies.
Troubleshoot delivery, process, or technical issues in collaboration with support, infrastructure, and product teams.
Drive solutions toward stable operation with minimal ongoing maintenance.
Experience as a Solution Engineer, Technical Solutions Engineer, Data Scientist, Data/Systems Analyst, or Technical Project Manager.
Proven experience owning projects end-to-end, including scoping, delivery, and stakeholder management.
Direct experience working with external customers on technical projects (requirements gathering, delivery, iteration).
Strong Python skills for data manipulation (e.g. NumPy, pandas), natural language processing (e.g. NLTK, spaCy), and building lightweight web services or tools (e.g. FastAPI, Flask).
Solid understanding of ML concepts and data workflows; familiarity with LLMs and prompt engineering is a strong plus.
Experience designing multi-stage pipelines and complex systems.
Understanding of software development fundamentals: version control, testing, MVPs, iterative development etc..
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, ML/AI, Software Engineering, or a related quantitative field such as Physics or Applied Mathematics, with strong analytical foundations.
Ability to reason about trade-offs between quality, speed, cost, and scalability.
Excellent English communication skills (B2+), with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
Confidence working with data engineers, ML engineers, and researchers from leading tech companies.
Strong ownership mindset: comfortable being accountable for outcomes, not just tasks.
Ability to manage multiple projects in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.
Experience with crowdsourcing, expert workflows, or large-scale data labeling.
Experience working on ML training, evaluation, or agentic systems.
Familiarity with quality frameworks, audits, or data validation pipelines.
Freelance collaboration via the Ontop freelance platform.
Flexible, fully remote work schedule.
You’ll have the opportunity to work on highly innovative projects at the leading edge of AI development, together with a genuinely dedicated and dynamic team of experts.
You’ll also be working on projects with customers that are AI industry leaders and well-known household names.
Friendly community.
description:
About the job

Company Intro




At Toloka AI we create data that powers leading GenAI models and innovations. We work with frontier labs, big tech, renowned AI startups, enterprises and non-profit research organizations worldwide. We use a combination of Experts + Crowd + Tech Platform to teach AI models to reason and evaluate their efficacy and safety. We have experts in more than 50 different domains—from doctors and lawyers to physicists and engineers—and boast one of the most diverse global crowds, representing over 100 countries and speaking 40+ languages. We are a well-funded startup with an enviable portfolio of clients including Anthropic, Amazon, Microsoft, Poolside, Recraft, and Shopify.




Recently, we secured strategic investment led by Bezos Expeditions and Nebius Group with participation from Mikhail Parakhin, CTO of Shopify and board advisor to leading GenAI companies, who now serves as our Chairman of the Board. Our remote-first team is globally distributed around the world: USA, UK, the Netherlands, Israel, Czech Republic, Serbia, and more.




About the Role




Technical consultants play a key role in our company, ensuring top-level delivery of our product, its correct configuration, and the deployment of tailored AI data solutions that meet our customers’ needs and deliver an exceptional experience working with us.




As part of this role, you will not only design and implement data labeling pipelines but also act as a trusted technical advisor for our customers - helping them understand their data needs, discover new opportunities, and build scalable AI solutions.




We are looking for a person with more than 3 years of solid technical background, who feels comfortable working in technical environments, solving data-related tasks using Python and AI, and communicating directly with customers. You should be a confident communicator able to engage with both technical and executive stakeholders and collaborate closely with our commercial team.




Responsibilities




1. Client Ownership & Communication




Act as the primary technical point of contact for customers across technical and executive stakeholders.
Lead discovery conversations to deeply understand client goals, problems and quality criteria.
Translate client needs into clear, actionable solution designs and delivery plans.
Advise customers on best practices in data collection, data quality, evaluation, and model training workflows.
Set expectations proactively, communicate progress regularly, and manage risks and trade-offs transparently.
Identify expansion opportunities and additional ways Toloka can create value through data and AI solutions.




2. Solution Design & Delivery




Design end-to-end data solutions using Toloka’s platform, selecting appropriate components, workflows, and quality controls.
Configure data labeling components and quality controls, develop user interfaces and AI-driven tooling (e.g. agentic systems, RAGs, synthetic data generation), and integrate them into end-to-end automated pipelines for AI training and evaluation.
Run experiments and pilots to validate quality, throughput, and cost assumptions.
Lead technical execution during delivery, coordinating internal teams and external stakeholders as needed.
Ensure solutions meet agreed quality, performance, and scalability requirements.




3. End-to-End Ownership & Project Management




Own delivery outcomes holistically - including technical performance, quality, timelines, and financial efficiency.
Monitor key KPIs (e.g. throughput, quality metrics, Gross Margin, Contribution Margin) and act on deviations.
Prioritize work based on customer impact and business value.
Analyze data to identify failure modes, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.
Continuously optimize solutions through iteration, automation, and adoption of new technologies.
Troubleshoot delivery, process, or technical issues in collaboration with support, infrastructure, and product teams.
Drive solutions toward stable operation with minimal ongoing maintenance.




Requirements




Core Experience




Experience as a Solution Engineer, Technical Solutions Engineer, Data Scientist, Data/Systems Analyst, or Technical Project Manager.
Proven experience owning projects end-to-end, including scoping, delivery, and stakeholder management.
Direct experience working with external customers on technical projects (requirements gathering, delivery, iteration).




Technical Skills




Strong Python skills for data manipulation (e.g. NumPy, pandas), natural language processing (e.g. NLTK, spaCy), and building lightweight web services or tools (e.g. FastAPI, Flask).
Solid understanding of ML concepts and data workflows; familiarity with LLMs and prompt engineering is a strong plus.
Experience designing multi-stage pipelines and complex systems.
Understanding of software development fundamentals: version control, testing, MVPs, iterative development etc..
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, ML/AI, Software Engineering, or a related quantitative field such as Physics or Applied Mathematics, with strong analytical foundations.
Ability to reason about trade-offs between quality, speed, cost, and scalability.




Communication & Ownership




Excellent English communication skills (B2+), with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
Confidence working with data engineers, ML engineers, and researchers from leading tech companies.
Strong ownership mindset: comfortable being accountable for outcomes, not just tasks.
Ability to manage multiple projects in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.




Nice to have




Experience with crowdsourcing, expert workflows, or large-scale data labeling.
Experience working on ML training, evaluation, or agentic systems.
Familiarity with quality frameworks, audits, or data validation pipelines.




What we can offer




Freelance collaboration via the Ontop freelance platform.
Flexible, fully remote work schedule.
You’ll have the opportunity to work on highly innovative projects at the leading edge of AI development, together with a genuinely dedicated and dynamic team of experts.
You’ll also be working on projects with customers that are AI industry leaders and well-known household names.
Friendly community.

About the job

About Forceget

Forceget is a tech-enabled global logistics and fulfillment company powering ecommerce sellers across Amazon, Shopify, Walmart, and DTC channels. We offer international shipping, warehousing, FBA prep, seller reimbursements, and profit optimization tools that help brands scale without the operational headaches.




The Role

We're hiring a Business Development Representative to drive outbound pipeline for our sales team. You'll prospect, qualify, and book meetings through multi-channel outreach — cold calls, email, WhatsApp, and LinkedIn — using proven playbooks designed to get results. This is a high-activity, high-accountability role for someone who wants to compete, hit targets, and grow fast.




What You'll Do

Execute high-volume outbound outreach via phone, email, WhatsApp, and LinkedIn to generate qualified meetings
Research and qualify prospects to confirm fit with our ideal customer profile
Manage your pipeline and activity logging in our CRM with accuracy and consistency
Follow outreach sequences and playbooks across multiple Forceget service lines
Collaborate with your team lead and sales managers on lead strategy and follow-up
Complete structured onboarding and ongoing training through our internal LMS




What You Bring

Based in Mexico (required)

3+ years in outbound sales or business development, with a focus on cold outreach (not inbound or account management)
Proven track record of hitting activity and pipeline targets
Comfortable with high call volumes and handling rejection
Proficiency in CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)
Self-disciplined, punctual, and accountable without needing oversight
Competitive, results-driven mindset
Strong written communication skills
Experience selling to US-based businesses is a strong plus
Familiarity with ecommerce, Amazon, logistics, or supply chain is a plus but not required




What We Offer

Structured onboarding with dedicated training materials and playbooks
Clear career path within a growing global company
Competitive compensation with performance-based incentives
A fast-paced, results-driven team that rewards hustle and ownership

description:
About the job

Remote | Full-Time | Orange Trail

Are you a commercially driven sales professional who wants to be rewarded based on performance?

Do you understand paid advertising, media buying, or the challenges businesses face with ad account restrictions?




Are you comfortable with outbound prospecting, networking, follow-up, and taking ownership of pipeline growth?

If yes, this role could be a strong fit.




About Orange Trail: 




Orange Trail is an advertising infrastructure agency helping direct advertisers and agencies scale with more stability across major advertising platforms.




We work with high-spending advertisers across industries such as fashion, technology, health & beauty, and other performance-driven niches. Our clients rely on us to help reduce disruption from platform restrictions, improve account stability, and support continued growth.




We are now hiring one Business Development Specialist to help us generate new opportunities, build relationships, and grow our client base globally.




The Role:




You will be responsible for finding, engaging, qualifying, and nurturing potential clients and partners for Orange Trail.




This is a hands-on business development role. You will be expected to actively prospect across channels, start conversations, identify opportunities, and help move qualified leads through the pipeline.




You will start by focusing on lead generation, outbound messaging, appointment setting, follow-up, and qualification. As you prove performance and gain deeper product knowledge, you may also begin taking closing calls.




This role requires a high level of autonomy. We will provide training, direction, and support, but you should be comfortable taking ownership of your work without needing constant supervision. You will be expected to manage your own pipeline, stay organized, follow up consistently, solve problems independently, and proactively find new opportunities.




Responsibilities:




Identify and prospect potential clients through Facebook groups, forums, LinkedIn, email, communities, networking, and other relevant channels
Reach out to qualified leads through outbound DMs, emails, and other direct channels
Book qualified sales calls for the team
Follow up with existing leads and nurture opportunities in the pipeline
Qualify prospects based on their business model, ad spend, advertising challenges, and fit for our services
Maintain clean and organized pipeline activity inside our HubSpot CRM
Build relationships with potential referral partners and agencies
Learn our offer deeply and understand the common advertising problems our prospects face
Support upsell and cross-sell opportunities where relevant
Take closing calls




What Are We Looking For:




Strong sales hunger and a performance-driven mindset
Excellent written and spoken English
Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally
Self-starter attitude with strong ownership over results
Highly autonomous and able to manage your own day without constant supervision
Organized, process-oriented, and consistent with follow-up
Comfortable doing high-volume outbound prospecting
Able to figure things out independently, ask smart questions when needed, and keep moving without waiting for step-by-step instructions
Curious about paid advertising, online business, and growth marketing
Willing to learn quickly and improve based on feedback
The mindset that with enough effort, thinking, and consistency, most problems can be solved




Preferred Experience:




Previous experience in sales, business development, appointment setting, or outbound prospecting
Experience with paid ads, media buying, affiliate marketing, e-commerce, agencies, or performance marketing
Familiarity with tools such as HubSpot, Notion, Slack, Google Docs, and similar platforms
Ability to recognize common advertising issues prospects may be facing
Experience upselling or cross-selling services is a plus




What You Get:




Base pay plus uncapped commission on deals you bring in
Remote work flexibility
Opportunity to grow into a larger sales
Direct exposure to high-level advertisers and agency owners
A meritocratic environment where performance is recognized and rewarded
Training, support, and a clear path to increase your responsibility over time




 Requirements: 




You must be available 30-40 hours per week
You must be able to communicate fluently in English
You must be able to show examples of previous sales, outreach, lead generation, or business development work
Paid advertising knowledge, experience or understanding is a must
Applications must be submitted in English




How to Apply: 

We are only hiring one person for this role right now.

To apply, include the word “Scaling” in your first message so we know you read the full description.

Please also include a short summary of your previous sales, outreach, or business development experience, along with any examples of previous work or results you can share.

title: Coordinador de Marketing - General Medicines
skills: Coordinate the execution of marketing campaigns (digital and traditional).
Manage the content and campaign calendar.
Supervise external agencies and suppliers.
Analyze markets, performance metrics (KPIs), and generate/review reports.
Support strategic planning alongside the product and commercial team.
Collaborate with internal teams and the sales force.
Manage budgets and control campaign expenses.
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business Administration, or related fields.
Experience in marketing and elaboration of campaigns (omnichannel)
Intermediate-advanced English.
Intermediate-advanced Excel skills.
Strong collaboration with product/commercial areas.
description:
About the job

Business Introduction

GSK remains committed to achieving bold commercial ambitions for the future. By 2031, we aim to deliver £40 billion in annual sales, leveraging our existing strong performance momentum to significantly increase our positive impact on the health of billions of patients globally. Our Ahead Together strategy is centred on early intervention to prevent and alter the course of disease, thereby protecting people and supporting healthcare systems.

Our diverse portfolio consists of vaccines, specialty medicines, and general medicines.

Through continuous innovation and a dedicated focus on scientific and technical excellence, we strive to develop and launch new, groundbreaking treatments that address critical health challenges.

Position Summary

In this role we are looking to coordinate, execute, and monitor the company’s marketing strategies, working closely with the Brand Manager. Also, you will ensure the correct implementation of campaigns, execution of promotional events, materials, and the brand’s positioning across various channels.

Key Responsibilities: 


 Coordinate the execution of marketing campaigns (digital and traditional).
 Manage the content and campaign calendar.
 Supervise external agencies and suppliers.
 Analyze markets, performance metrics (KPIs), and generate/review reports.
 Support strategic planning alongside the product and commercial team.
 Collaborate with internal teams and the sales force.
 Manage budgets and control campaign expenses.


Requirements: 


 Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business Administration, or related fields.
 Experience in marketing and elaboration of campaigns (omnichannel)
 Intermediate-advanced English.
 Intermediate-advanced Excel skills.
 Strong collaboration with product/commercial areas.


Why GSK?

Uniting science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together.

GSK is a global biopharma company with a purpose to unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. We aim to positively impact the health of 2.5 billion people by the end of the decade, as a successful, growing company where people can thrive. We get ahead of disease by preventing and treating it with innovation in specialty medicines and vaccines. We focus on four therapeutic areas: respiratory, immunology and inflammation; oncology; HIV; and infectious diseases – to impact health at scale.

People and patients around the world count on the medicines and vaccines we make, so we’re committed to creating an environment where our people can thrive and focus on what matters most. Our culture of being ambitious for patients, accountable for impact and doing the right thing is the foundation for how, together, we deliver for patients, shareholders and our people.

If you require any type of accommodation and/or support during the selection process to better showcase your abilities (for example, access to ramps, accessible emergency exits, visual aids, etc.), please let us know when we contact you. We are here to support you.

Your application is voluntary; therefore, you understand and consent that GSK, located at Real Mayorazgo 130, Torre M, Piso 20, Col. Xoco, Benito Juárez, Mexico City, will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy in accordance with the candidate privacy notice, which can be consulted at Candidate Privacy Notice. Among the information you provide for this purpose, you may choose to give us personal data that will help ensure an inclusive selection process. Rest assured that your information will be treated with the utmost confidentiality, in compliance with applicable regulations, and will not be available to hiring managers or anyone outside the recruitment team. Help us maintain, together, an inclusive and welcoming environment. By submitting information, I confirm that I agree that it will be processed in accordance with the stated privacy notice.

Important notice to Employment businesses/ Agencies

GSK does not accept referrals from employment businesses and/or employment agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site. All employment businesses/agencies are required to contact GSK's commercial and general procurement/human resources department to obtain prior written authorization before referring any candidates to GSK. The obtaining of prior written authorization is a condition precedent to any agreement (verbal or written) between the employment business/ agency and GSK. In the absence of such written authorization being obtained any actions undertaken by the employment business/agency shall be deemed to have been performed without the consent or contractual agreement of GSK. GSK shall therefore not be liable for any fees arising from such actions or any fees arising from any referrals by employment businesses/agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site.

Find more about life at GSK at www.gsk.com

Solid background in trade marketing, sales or marketing with a proven track record of crafting compelling trade strategies.

Excellent ability to analyse data and translate it into actionable strategies.
Creative thinker with a results-driven mindset and ability to adapt to market shifts. - Effective communicator and influencer, adept at stakeholder engagement and negotiation.
